parameters.text: To start the blade, wait until all material full, then turn off these constant combinator sequentially, the order is: [item=iron-plate][item=copper-cable], [item=coal], [item=sulfur][item=electronic-circuit], [item=chemical-science-pack][virtual-signal=signal-clock]. Wait until no movement before deactivating each subsequent constant combinator.

entities.name: constant-combinator
entities.player_description: Turn off this to activate the blade, make sure materials are full before turning off.
